plans.approvalTarget: approve artshelf cleanup ledger /path/to/example-project/.artshelf/ledger.jsonl plan plan_20260606_120000_ab12

readyForApproval.label: Clean up temp debug output
readyForApproval.approvalTarget: approve artshelf cleanup ledger /path/to/example-project/.artshelf/ledger.jsonl plan plan_20260606_120000_ab12
readyForApproval.reason: Disposable temp artifact has a reviewed cleanup plan.
readyForApproval.nextStep: Approve the exact cleanup plan to move the artifact into Artshelf trash.

readyForApproval.label: Review 1 reconcile remap finding(s) in example-project
readyForApproval.approvalTarget: approve artshelf reconcile ledger /path/to/example-project/.artshelf/ledger.jsonl plan plan_20260606_122000_repl
readyForApproval.reason: Parent folder drift looks safe to reconcile after inspection and review.

readyForApproval.label: Resolve missing report record
readyForApproval.approvalTarget: approve artshelf resolve missing ledger /path/to/example-project/.artshelf/ledger.jsonl ids shf_20260606_120500_cd34
readyForApproval.reason: The report path is already missing.
readyForApproval.nextStep: Approve the ledger-only resolve command after confirming the report is no longer needed.

needsReviewFirst.label: Review 1 reconcile resolve-stale-trash finding(s) in example-project
needsReviewFirst.reason: Trash references point to trashed artifacts whose originals moved or got deleted.
needsReviewFirst.nextStep: run `artshelf reconcile --dry-run --ledger /path/to/example-project/.artshelf/ledger.jsonl --json`, then approve with `approve artshelf reconcile ledger /path/to/example-project/.artshelf/ledger.jsonl plan <plan-id>`

needsReviewFirst.label: Review 1 reconcile registry-remap finding(s) in example-project
needsReviewFirst.reason: Ledger name or registry path drift needs explicit review before remapping records.
needsReviewFirst.nextStep: run `artshelf reconcile --dry-run --ledger /path/to/example-project/.artshelf/ledger.jsonl --json`, then approve with `approve artshelf reconcile ledger /path/to/example-project/.artshelf/ledger.jsonl plan <plan-id>`

blocked.label: Review 1 reconcile blocked finding(s) in example-project
blocked.reason: Path drift is ambiguous or unsafe and needs manual investigation.
blocked.nextStep: Run a manual artifact-by-artifact review and decide whether to keep, resolve, or move the ledger entry.

recommendation: Run reconcile dry-run for stale/missing path entries, then follow the exact approvals returned in the review packet.

items.reason: temporary debug output retained for 3 days
items.note: The path exists, cleanup=trash, and the dry-run plan moves it into Artshelf trash.
Resolution updates only the ledger and does not move or delete files.

items.proposedAction: reconcile stale trashed entry after review
items.reason: trash path is stale after source artifact delete
items.note: Run reconcile to confirm whether to rewrite the artifact path or resolve manually.

items.reason: Artifact moved by repository migration from .shelf to .artshelf
items.note: Review registry identity and run reconcile dry-run before executing any path updates.

items.reason: reconstructed paths conflicted with another active artifact
items.note: Blocked finding intentionally requires human disambiguation.

alternatives: keep the artifact and change retention
inspect the path before approving cleanup

verification.successCondition: no due, manual-review, missing-path, executable, or refused entries remain unless explicitly reported
